country_result:

City: Whitianga
Continent: Oceania
final_reasoning: The image shows a coastal road with lush, tropical vegetation including ferns and palm trees, suggesting a tropical or subtropical climate. The road markings (white dashed center line and solid white edge lines) and the left-hand side of the road (implied by the direction of travel and road layout) are characteristic of countries like New Zealand or Australia. The architecture of the small white house with a corrugated metal roof is very common in rural New Zealand. The presence of the ocean on the right and the specific greenery (ferns) strongly point towards the North Island of New Zealand. Based on the coastal topography and road style, this is located on the Coromandel Peninsula.
